bids.reasoning: At t=0.00 there is no time pressure to concede, and the opponent’s first offer gives me the minimum utility on every issue. I am targeting my maximum-utility bid while establishing my preferred anchor, especially on the high-weight issues issueA and issueB.

I am targeting a very high utility bid (about 0.98) because it is still the opening phase at t=0.02 and there is no time pressure to make major concessions. The opponent has repeated the same all-valueE offer, which is very low utility for me and shows no concession yet, so I will only make a small move on a low-weight issue while holding firm on the most important issues.

I am targeting a very high utility bid around 0.96 because it is still very early in the negotiation at t=0.04, so there is no need for major concessions yet. The opponent has only slightly improved from all valueE to valueD on issueA while keeping the rest at valueE, so their offers remain very low utility for me and do not justify conceding on my high-weight issues. I am conceding only on lower-weight issueD and issueE while holding firm on issueA, issueB, and issueC.

At t=0.06 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.94 rather than making major concessions. The opponent has only moved slightly from all valueE to issueA=valueD while keeping the rest at valueE, so I read them as mostly holding firm; I will concede only on lower-weight issues while protecting issueA and issueB.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.92 because it is still very early in the negotiation and the opponent’s offers remain very low for me. The opponent has only made minor movement from all valueE to one issue at valueD, so I will concede only on lower-weight issues while holding firm on issueA, issueB, and issueC. This also avoids repeating my previous exact bid.

I am targeting about 0.90 utility because it is still very early, so there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent has moved only slightly from all valueE offers toward small concessions on issueA/issueB, so I will hold firm on the high-weight issues A, B, and C while conceding further on the low-weight issueD and keeping issueE at valueB.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.88 because it is still very early at t=0.12, so there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has only slightly improved from all valueE, mainly on issueA and issueB, while still holding issueC-D-E at valueE, so I will concede only on a low-weight issue and keep my high-weight issues strong.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.86 because it is still early at t=0.14, so there is no need to make major concessions on the high-weight issues A, B, and C. The opponent’s offers remain very low for me, though they have started moving slightly on issueA/issueB, so I will continue conceding mainly on lower-weight issueD/issueE while holding my strongest issues.

I am targeting a high utility bid of about 0.84 because it is still early at t=0.16, so there is no need to make major concessions on the high-weight issues. The opponent has mostly held to very low-value offers for me, though their latest offer conceded issueA to valueA; with no messages, I rely only on the bids and concede only on the lowest-weight issueE while holding issueA, issueB, and issueC firm.

I am targeting about 0.80 utility, which is still strong for me but makes a fresh concession as we are moving out of the opening phase. The opponent’s offers remain low for my utility, though they have started conceding sporadically on issueA/issueB/issueC; with no messages, I rely only on the bid pattern and keep my high-weight issues A and B at my top values while conceding further on lower/medium priority issues.

I am targeting a utility around 0.76, which is a moderate concession from my prior offers while still protecting the high-weight issues A and B. At t=0.20 there is still time, so I should not move close to the opponent’s low-utility offers, but their latest bids show some concession on issueA and issueB while remaining tough on issueC/D/E. I will keep issueA and issueB at my best values and concede further on issueC, with issueD and issueE already at low-priority concessions.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.72 because it is early-mid negotiation at t=0.22, so there is no need to drop near the opponent’s low offers yet. The opponent has made only modest concessions and their best offers to me are still around 0.44 utility, mostly holding issueB/issueC/issueD/issueE low, so I will concede further on issueC while holding the high-weight issueA and issueB at my preferred values.

I am targeting a utility around 0.70–0.76 since it is still early-mid negotiation at t=0.24, so I should concede only cautiously while keeping high-weight issueA and issueB strong. The opponent’s offers have improved somewhat for me, especially on issueA/issueB/issueC, but they still mostly hold issueD and issueE at valueE, so I concede those lower-weight issues and make a moderate tradeoff on issueB/issueC without repeating my immediately previous bid.

I am targeting a utility around 0.72, still well above reservation because it is early-mid negotiation at t=0.26, but with meaningful concessions on lower-weight issues. The opponent’s latest valid offer improves my utility to about 0.48 and signals willingness to give me issueA=valueA while still pushing hard on issueB, so I will hold firm on issueB and concede issueC/D/E toward their apparent preferred side.

I am targeting a utility of about 0.68, conceding further on issueC while holding firm on the high-weight issueA and issueB. At t=0.28 there is still time, and the opponent’s bids remain low for me overall, with only sporadic concessions and no supporting messages, so I should not move too close to their preferred end yet.

I am targeting a utility around 0.66, a moderate concession for t=0.30 while still protecting the high-weight issues, especially issueA. The opponent has mostly offered low-value bids for me, but their recent bids show some movement on issueB and occasional movement on issueA, so I am conceding on issueB and the lower-weight issues while avoiding a repeat of my previous bid.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.64: lower than my last offer but still preserving my highest-weight issueA at valueA. At t=0.32 there is some time pressure but not enough to match the opponent’s latest 0.54-utility offer; their recent bids show movement toward valueA on issueA and some concession on issueB/issueC while holding issueD/issueE low, so I concede mainly on issueD and issueE and make a tradeoff on issueB/issueC.

I am targeting a utility around 0.58, conceding somewhat because we are in the early-mid phase but not yet near the deadline. The opponent has recently improved offers on issueA and issueC, including offering my top value on issueA and valueC on issueC, while still holding issueB and low-weight issues mostly low; I will hold issueA, accept their signal on issueC, and concede more on issueB plus issueD/issueE.

I am targeting a utility of about 0.62 by matching the opponent’s latest offer, which is already better for me than my immediately previous bid. At t=0.36 there is still time, but the opponent has shown meaningful concession on high-weight issues A and B while holding C/D/E low, so mirroring their acceptable-looking bid is a strong path to agreement without unnecessary further concession.
